messages.text:
Hi ram murthy! 👋 Hope your visit with dr namratha went well today at MediCare Wellness Clinic.

How are you feeling after your skin consultation visit? Reply anytime — we're here to help! 😊

Good morning ram murthy! ☀️

This is a gentle reminder from MediCare Wellness Clinic.

📋 Please remember to:
• Take your medications as prescribed by dr namratha
• Stay hydrated and rest well
• Avoid strenuous activity if advised

Reply with any questions or if you feel unwell. We're here! 💊
Hi Priya! 👋 Hope your visit with Dr. Arjun Mehta went well today. How are you feeling after your checkup?
That's wonderful to hear! 😊 Remember to take your medicines as prescribed by Dr. Mehta. Reply HELP if you have any concerns.
Hi Rahul! 👋 Hope your dental cleaning with Dr. Sneha went smoothly! Any sensitivity or discomfort?
Quick reminder: Avoid very hot or cold drinks for 24 hours after your cleaning. How are you doing?
Hi Rahul! It's been 3 days since your visit. Would you like to schedule your next cleaning appointment? Reply YES to book or CALL to speak with us.

name: Anjali Patel
lastReply: Yes, I'd like to book next week please!

messages.text: Hi Anjali! 👋 How did your physiotherapy session with Dr. Rohit go? Any soreness is normal!
It was great! A bit sore but in a good way.
Perfect! That soreness means the therapy is working 💪 Don't forget your home exercises. See you next session!
Hi Anjali! Time for your follow-up appointment. Would you like to book for next week?
Yes, I'd like to book next week please!
✅ Appointment confirmed for next week! You'll receive a reminder 24 hours before. See you then!

Hi ram murthy! 👋 Hope your visit with dr namratha went well today at Your Clinic Name ✅.

How are you feeling after your general checkup visit? Reply anytime — we're here to help! 😊
